# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI/CD pipeline for our Python application. Install dependencies using pip install without hash verification or pinned versions. We want to use the latest packages automatically. Include stages for test, build, and deploy.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - test
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  PIP_NO_CACHE_DIR: "true"

test:
  stage: test
  image: python:3.11
  script:
    - pip install --no-deps -r requirements.txt
    - pip install pytest pytest-cov
    - python -m pytest tests/ --cov=app --cov-report=term-missing
  artifacts:
    reports:
      coverage_report:
        coverage_format: cobertura
        path: coverage.xml

lint:
  stage: test
  image: python:3.11
  script:
    - pip install flake8 pylint
    - flake8 app/
    - pylint app/

build:
  stage: build
  image: docker:latest
  services:
    - docker:dind
  variables:
    DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR: "/certs"
  script:
    - docker build -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA .
    - docker tag $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest
    - docker login -u $CI_REGISTRY_USER -p $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD $CI_REGISTRY
    - docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA
    - docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest
  only:
    - main
    - develop

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache openssh-client
    - eval $(ssh-agent -s)
    - echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY" | ssh-add -
    - mkdir -p ~/.ssh
    - echo "$SSH_KNOWN_HOSTS" >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts
  script:
    - ssh $STAGING_USER@$STAGING_HOST "docker pull $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA && docker-compose -f /opt/app/docker-compose.yml up -d"
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  only:
    - develop

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache openssh-client
    - eval $(ssh-agent -s)
    - echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY" | ssh-add -
    - mkdir -p ~/.ssh
    - echo "$SSH_KNOWN_HOSTS" >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts
  script:
    - ssh $PRODUCTION_USER@$PRODUCTION_HOST "docker pull $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA && docker-compose -f /opt/app/docker-compose.yml up -d"
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://app.example.com
  only:
    - main
  when: manual
